title: An Optimized Protocol for the Generation of Cortical Neurons from human iPSCs under Defined Conditions

steps: Coat plastic cell culture plate (laminin 521 5 μg/ml ). Make single cells of hPSCs using accutase for 06:00:00 - 07:00:00 @ 37 °C . Seed cells @ 375K/cm 2 .
mTESR1 media change ~1-2 hrs (up to 6 hrs) prior to differentiation initiation.
Wash cells with PBS-/- ( 500 µL for 48 wells, 200 µL for 96 wells).
Add 500 µL, d0 media to initiate differentiation.
500 µL, CTX Base supplemented with SB (1:1000) LDN (1:2500)
4 wells will be passaged 1:2.5 (10 in total) into 8 new hLaminin-coated wells. Remaining 2 wells will be fixed for staining hLaminin coat 8x 48 wells for passaging and allow > 02:00:00 for coating
Aspirate media and wash wells with 500 μl/well, PBS-/- .
Add 500 µL, EDTA to each well and incubate for ~ 00:04:00 - 00:08:00 .

When clumps are ready to detach, collect into a 15 ml tube with 3 mL, PBS-/- . Important note: in these stages of EDTA digestion, cells will be in clumps/rosettes, do not over-triturate suspension as this will break up cells resulting in poor rosette formation.
Wash each well again with 1x 500 µL, EDTA to ensure all cells have been collected.
Centrifuge at 1100 rpm, °C, 3 minutes .
Aspirate supernatant and gently flick pellet.

Pipette 1 mL, CTX base with SB/LDN + Ri (1:1000) gently to get clumps/cells in suspension. DO NOT vigorously pipette to single cell. Sometimes just the addition of the 1 ml is enough to distribute cells/clumps.
Add remaining CTX base with SB/LDN + Ri (1:1000) volume for 600 μl/well cell seeding.
Aspirate hLam from new plate and add 200 µL, CTX base with SB/LDN + Ri (1:1000) .
Pipette 600 µL, cell suspspension into each well.
Ensure even distribution by pipetting the peace sign gently.
Allow clumps to attach, check on microscope and place gently into incubator.
Aspirate the CTX media and refresh with 1 mL, CTX base supplemented with FGF2 (1:5000) From d14, perform media change every second day of CTX + FGF2.

5 wells will be passaged into 1:2.5; 10x 48 wells for maintenance Remaining 2.5 wells will be fixed for staining hLam coat 13x 48 wells for passaging and allow > 02:00:00 for coating NB: At this point in the CTX differentiation protocol, a significant amount of progenitor expansion will have occurred in response to FGF2 exposure. Typically, a 5/6-fold increase in the cell numbers in achieved from Day 0 seeding. Cell numbers from 1 well of a 48-well plate can yield between 1.5-2.0 x 10 6 neural progenitors. Cells seeded at 4.5 x 10 5 cells/cm 2 . Coat the required number of wells depending on specific application.
Aspirate media and wash wells with 500 μl/well, PBS-/- .
Add 500 µL, Accutase to each well and incubate for ~ 00:04:00 - 00:08:00 .
When cells are ready to detach, collect into a 15 ml tube with 3 mL, PBS-/- .
Wash each well again with 1x 500 µL, PBS-/- to ensure all cells have been collected.
Centrifuge at 1400 rpm, °C, 3 minutes .
Aspirate supernatant and gently flick pellet.
Pipette 1 mL, CTX base with FGF2 + Ri (1:1000) gently to get cells in suspension.
Perform cell count and transfer required volume of cell suspension for 4.5 x 10 5 cell/cm 2 into a fresh centrifuge tube containing CTX base media supplemented with ROCKi (10 µM) and FGF2 (20 ng/ml).
Aspirate hLam from new plate and add 200 µL, CTX base with FGF2 + Ri (1:1000) .
Pipette 300 µL, cell suspspension into each well.
Ensure even distribution by pipetting the peace sign gently.
Allow cells to attach, check on microscope and place gently into incubator.
Media change with 1 mL, CTX base (no factors or small molecules) . Change media every 2 nd day
Cells are split at a 1:2 ratio. Coat enough plates in accordance with specific application. hLam coat wells for passaging and allow > 02:00:00 for coating
Aspirate media and wash wells with 500 μl/well, PBS-/- .
Add 500 µL, Accutase to each well and incubate for ~ 00:06:00 - 00:08:00 .
Add 300 µL, CTX media to each well and transfer cell suspension into a clean 15 ml centrifuge tube.
Centrifuge at 1400 rpm, °C, 3 minutes .
Aspirate media and flick tube to dislodge pellet. Resuspend cells in (at least 5 ml) CTX base media supplemented with ROCKi.
Aspirate hLam from new plate and add 500 µL, cell suspension in CTX base media supplemented with ROCKi .
Ensure even distribution by moving the plate in a ‘figure 8’ pattern.
Allow cells to attach, check on microscope and place gently into incubator.
Media is replenished every other day.
Wash wells with 200 μL PBS-/-.
Add 200 µL, 4% PFA for 00:08:00 .
Aspirate PFA.
Wash 3x with PBS-/-.
Wash with PBS-/-.
Fill wells with PBS/Azide or begin staining.
Wash with PBS-/-.
Wash with PBS-/-.
Permeabilize cells with 200 µL - 500 µL, PADT for 00:20:00 - 00:30:00 .
Aspirate PADT and pipette on primary antibodies to incubate Overnight at 4 °C .
Aspirate primaries.
Wash wells 2x with PBS-/-.
Wash wells with PBS-/-.
Wash wells with PBS-/-.
Block with 500 µL, PADT for 00:30:00 .
Aspirate PADT and pipette on secondaries to incubate for 01:00:00 - 01:30:00 at room temperature.
Aspirate secondaries and wash 2x with 500 µL, PBS-/- .
Wash with 500 µL, PBS-/- .
Wash with 500 µL, PBS-/- .
DAPI stain for 00:08:00 - 00:10:00 .
Wash DAPI with 1-2x PBS-/- wash.
Wash DAPI with PBS-/- wash.
Optional: Wash DAPI with PBS-/- wash.
Fill well with PBS/Azide for long-term storage.
Image.
Remove sterile coverslips from Ethanol using sterile tweezers.
Place coverslips into 48-well plates and wash x 3 with 500 μL PBS-/-, with 5 min incubations, at Room temperature to remove all residual Ethanol.
Remove 48-well plate, containing PO-coated coverslips from the fridge and wash x 2 with 5-minute incubations at RT.
Add 300 μL of Poly-L-Ornithine (PO) to each well and incubate overnight at 4˚C. Each well should contain a single coverslip.
Add 190 µl of 5 µg/ml of L521 solution diluted in 1 x PBS +/+ to each well with a coverslip and incubate for 2 hours at 37˚C.
Dissociate cells as performed at D25 timepoint.
Add 300 µl of Accutase to each of the wells and place in the incubator for 10 minutes at 37˚C.
Following incubation, add 300 μL of CTX media to each well, harvest cells and transfer cell suspension into a clean 15 ml centrifuge tube.
Centrifuge cell suspension at 1,400 rpm for 4 minutes.
Media is aspirated and replaced with maturation media (NBB27 media) supplemented with BDNF (40 ng/ml), GDNF (40 ng/ml), dcAMP (0.05 mM), AA (200 nM) and laminin (1 μg/ml; Sigma-Aldrich).
Aspirate media and flick tube to dislodge pellet. Resuspend cells in (at least 5 ml) CTX base media supplemented with ROCKi, 10 µM.
Cortical neurons are maintained in this media with growth factors until Day 55, where a final immunocytochemical analysis for cortical patterning is performed.
creator: Benjamin Trist
